title: citrus serotina
intro: Citrus serotina, also known as the yellow foot, is a species of citrus tree native to the subtropical regions of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Citrus serotina include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. Citrus serotina can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
